mission_title: Building a legacy of love and care.
mission_text: At Lighthouse Communion Church, we believe in the transformative power of grace. Our mission with Pastor Bright is to raise a generation that embodies power through service, character through integrity, and charisma through the Holy Spirit.

activities.title: Children's Ministry
activities.description: Nurturing faith in our youngest members.

activities.title: Worship Arts
activities.description: Expressing devotion through music and art.
